entities.girl: an older girl with crossed arms

scenes.title: The Living Room
scenes.background_prompt: A cozy living room with a large beige couch, a wooden side table, a windowsill with a cushion, a patterned rug on the floor, and scattered flower petals. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A cozy living room. An older girl of about ten with long dark hair, wearing a red t-shirt and jeans, stands in the center of the room with her arms tightly crossed over her chest and her brows furrowed in a stern expression. She stares down at the floor where a broken white ceramic vase lies in several pieces on a patterned rug, with water pooled around it and pink and yellow flowers scattered among the shards. To the left, a younger boy of about six with curly blond hair peeks out nervously from behind a large beige couch, only his wide eyes and the top of his head visible above the armrest. An orange tabby cat sits calmly on the windowsill to the right, its tail curled around its paws, watching the scene with half-closed eyes. A wooden side table stands where the vase presumably fell from, now empty.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl in the center of the room, standing with arms tightly crossed, brows furrowed, staring down at the broken vase. Place boy peeking out from behind the couch (left), only wide eyes and top of head visible. Place cat on the windowsill (right), sitting calmly with tail curled. Place vase broken on the rug with water pooled and flowers scattered.
